title: AEP RECOGNIZED FOR EMPLOYEE ENGAGEMENT EFFORTS, RECEIVES GALLUP'S EXCEPTIONAL WORKPLACE AWARD
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio , March 29, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- American Electric Power (Nasdaq: AEP) has received the 2023 Gallup Exceptional Workplace Award, which recognizes organizations that incorporate employee engagement into core business values. This is the fourth consecutive year AEP has been honored with the award.

title: Don't Overlook This Reliable, Dividend-Paying Sector
text: What happens when markets go into panic mode? Investors turn to asset classes or sectors they believe are likely to either pay a dividend or that have a low correlation to equity markets.

title: AEP NAMES STURGESS SVP, CONTROLLER AND CHIEF ACCOUNTING OFFICER
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio , March 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- American Electric Power (Nasdaq: AEP) has named Kate Sturgess senior vice president, controller and chief accounting officer effective May 9. In this role, she will be responsible for all aspects of accounting, financial reporting and regulatory accounting services.

title: EBR vs. AEP: Which Stock Should Value Investors Buy Now?
text: EBR vs. AEP: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?

title: American Electric Power Is Juggling Assets
text: American Electric Power is selling 1,200 MW of wind and 165 MW of solar in 11 states. The utility will invest $40B in 5 years to add 17,000 MW of generation resources and improve transmission infrastructure.

title: High Yield Stock Watchlist: March 2023
text: There are 17 stocks on my high-yield watchlist for March 2023. The majority of the stocks on my watchlist are undervalued based on dividend yield theory.

title: AEP NAMES MARSH VICE PRESIDENT OF SAFETY AND HEALTH
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio , March 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- American Electric Power (Nasdaq: AEP) has named Michelle Marsh vice president, Safety and Health, effective March 4. In this role, she will be responsible for leading the development and implementation of strategic initiatives designed to strengthen AEP's safety culture and performance.
